C5.note: Answer key expects very large GBSA ΔG (-50 to -100 kcal/mol without entropy), noisy but hotspot-capable. Agent: ΔG_GB -58.74 (SEM 0.55), ΔG_PB -61.30 (SEM 0.73) from FINAL_RESULTS.dat -- squarely in the -50..-100 window; hotspots identified via decomposition. Source paper (Stauber et al. PNAS 2006, PMID 16477002, read via mcp__pubmed get_abstract) is the crystal-structure paper: confirms IL-2Rα forms the largest, charge-charge-dominated interface with high-affinity/fast association -- matching agent's -762 EEL/+799 desolvation signature and the over-binding vs experimental ~-11 kcal/mol. Paper is structural (no computed MMPBSA ΔG), so key's expected is a methodological range, confirmed consistent.
